Resolve the current workspace into a (SourceSnapshot, CatalogSnapshot)
pair and persist it through the catalog store.

A byte-identical re-refresh is idempotent: it reuses the existing snapshot,
prints the "up to date" form, and creates no new snapshot directory. When the
worktree is dirty the snapshot is marked local-only and a banner is printed.

Examples:
  orun catalog refresh
  orun catalog refresh --json

Exit codes:
  0  Snapshot created or reused (idempotent).
  1  Validation error (or any warning under --strict).
  2  Resolver internal error.
  3  StateStore conflict / persistence failure.

Usage:
  orun catalog refresh [flags]

Flags:
      --backend-url string        With --push: backend URL (Orun Cloud or self-hosted)
      --catalog-snapshot string   Bypass refs; pin to an explicit catalogSnapshotKey
      --catalog-source string     Resolve catalog by ref selector (current|main|latest|branches/<name>|prs/<n>|cat-<key>)
      --catalog-strict            Promote validation warnings to errors
      --environment string        With --push: target a named environment head (default: the project-wide head)
      --json                      Stable machine-readable output
      --no-infer                  Disable the inference layer (stage 6)
      --push                      After refreshing, push the snapshot to Orun Cloud and advance the head
      --source string             Alias for --catalog-source
      --strict                    Alias for --catalog-strict

Global Flags:
      --all                 Disable CWD-based component scoping; process all components
  -c, --config-dir string   Config directory for JobRegistry definitions (or set ORUN_CONFIG_DIR; use * or ** for recursive scanning)
  -i, --intent string       Intent file path (auto-discovered if not set) (default "intent.yaml")
